title: Lojonium Infection
description: Adds Red Unknown entities to INFECT your world
body:
This is Lojonium Infection

This mod adds your world red unknown entities to infect your world.
You should survive

Here's some information about systems and most entities of lojos:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


_Central Lojollo_ spreader of Infection. This mod has **GEP**(Global Evolution Point), **Stress** and **Lojomass** systems.

**GEP(Global Evolution point):**
If this is too high new lojo types will spawn by hives. Insreaces when a lojonius infects or mutateds evoldes.

**Stress:**
Insreaces when a lojo dies by a entity. If this is too high patrol will spawn for defend.

**Lojomass:**
Very dangerius. Increases by hives and central lojollo. If this is too high, strong lojo types will spawn naturally.

**Mutateds:**
Strong entities. Spawns when a living lojo piece evoldes. Living lojo piece appears when a infected entity evoldes. Mutateds can evolde to stronger.

**Hives:**
Another spreaders of infection. Captures blocks to make territory for lojos.

**Patrol:**
Spawns invaders and hijackers to INVADE a area or DEFEND lojos.

</details>


This mod is in only MODRİNTH or CURSEFORGE do not trust fakes.


**!THİS MOD İS İN ALPHA STAGE SO THERE CAN BE PROBLEMS AND THİS MOD İS NOT COMPLETED YET!**
